reply: (1) This device is an AutomationDirect GS10 Variable Frequency Drive, used to control motor speed. (2) Likely cause for a 3-year-old drive could be wear and tear on internal components. (3) Start by checking the input and output connections for any signs of damage or loose connections. For an unknown fault, inspect the drive for any visible signs of overheating, check the motor for any unusual noises or vibrations, and ensure the drive is properly grounded.
